# VaultShip

> Encrypt, harden, bind, and sign Docker/OCI containers against extraction and unauthorized execution.

## What is VaultShip?
VaultShip is an open-source Rust CLI for container-level protection. It encrypts OCI artifacts, hardens runtime defaults, verifies signatures, and enforces machine-bound execution.

## Core Features
- AES-256-GCM encryption for OCI layer artifacts
- Compose hardening and seccomp profile generation
- Hardware binding with signed bound-key files
- Signature verification with optional cosign enforcement
- OCI registry push/pull support with auth hooks

## Install
- Source: `cargo build --workspace`
- Repository: `https://github.com/cyberxdefend/vaultship`
- Docs: `https://vaultship.cyberxdefend.com`

## Image Registries
- `ghcr.io/cyberxdefend/vaultship`
- `docker.io/cyberxdefend/vaultship`
